title: Ubiquiti U-MPS-350W-AC, Power Supply, AC/DC, 350W
description: U-MPS-350W-AC is a backup power module with a power of 350W and is designed for selected Ubiquiti UniFi PoE Switches in a 19" rack with removable power supplies. The power supply can be used as an auxiliary power supply for supplying another 350W PoE output or as a backup to the primary power supply. The output voltage of the module is 54V DC US-L2-24-POE US-L2-48-POE
